CustomField.description: this holds the Owned By Company Values for Territory, User, ProductLine as: T:AES/U:LSDX/P:AES for reference purposes only. AS=ApplicationSegment for Dealer, R=R.TYPE in some scenarios
CustomField.inlineHelpText: this holds the Owned By Company Values for Territory, User, ProductLine as: T:AES/U:LSDX/P:AES for reference purposes only. AS=ApplicationSegment for Dealer, R=R.TYPE in some scenarios
CustomField.label: fxTagValues
